import pytest
from solution import findWinner

def test_basic_tie():
    N = 3
    A = [1, 2, 3]
    B = [3, 2, 1]
    C = [2, 1, 3]
    result = findWinner(N, A, B, C)
    assert result == 0  # All players tie

def test_distinct_winner():
    N = 3
    A = [3, 2, 1]
    B = [2, 1, 3]
    C = [1, 3, 2]
    result = findWinner(N, A, B, C)
    assert result == 0  # Player X wins

def test_min_input_size():
    N = 1
    A = [5]
    B = [4]
    C = [3]
    result = findWinner(N, A, B, C)
    assert result == 0  # Only one round, Player X wins

def test_large_numbers():
    N = 3
    A = [1000000, 999999, 1000001]
    B = [999999, 1000001, 1000000]
    C = [1000001, 1000000, 999999]
    result = findWinner(N, A, B, C)
    assert result == 0  # Player X wins with large numbers

def test_all_zero_scores():
    N = 3
    A = [0, 0, 0]
    B = [0, 0, 0]
    C = [0, 0, 0]
    result = findWinner(N, A, B, C)
    assert result == 0  # All players tie with zero scores


def test_multiple_ties():
    N = 3
    A = [2, 2, 2]
    B = [2, 2, 2]
    C = [2, 2, 2]
    result = findWinner(N, A, B, C)
    assert result == 0  # All players tie

def test_descending_order():
    N = 3
    A = [3, 2, 1]
    B = [3, 2, 1]
    C = [3, 2, 1]
    result = findWinner(N, A, B, C)
    assert result == 0  

def test_large_input_size():
    N = 1000
    A = [i for i in range(1000, 0, -1)]
    B = [i for i in range(999, -1, -1)]
    C = [i for i in range(998, -2, -1)]
    result = findWinner(N, A, B, C)
    assert result == 0  

def test_one_distinct_score():
    N = 3
    A = [1, 1, 1]
    B = [1, 1, 1]
    C = [1, 1, 2]
    result = findWinner(N, A, B, C)
    assert result == 2
